archive_layout: The ZIP may contain runtime/ or the three asset directories at its root.
notes: The project owner supplies the team Google Drive URL separately.
Only final inference assets belong in the archive; training checkpoints and BART weights are excluded.

assets.name: Nadiyah SciER DistilBERT
assets.attribution: Fine-tuned by Nadiyah on the supplied SciER data; compatibility repair removes token_type_ids at inference.

assets.name: Local MiniLM encoder
assets.attribution: sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2, used by Nadiyah's KeyBERT approach.

assets.name: spaCy English pipeline
assets.attribution: spaCy en_core_web_sm 3.8.0 for POS, dependencies, noun chunks, and organisations.
